caption:
You are not your circumstances, past situation or current situation

You are what you choose to become, if you stop being a victim

I don’t know who needs to hear this today or in general

But I believe that anyone can do anything

You think the battle is with your business

You think the battle is with the market

You might even blame others for your circumstances

None of the above achieves anything…

You just are choosing who you want to become 

It might take a week, month, year or 10 years

But you have to make that choice

Or you will stay stuck

Fuck comparing to others

Become your own success story and source of inspiration

This is a double-edged sword because when you’ve got ADHD you’ve often not got that much patience 

But if you genuinely take the time to understand how these systems work, I can’t begin to express what it can do for your business 

When you have ADHD, you run off dopamine and getting things done. When you are fully tapped into AI at the right type of level, you have an infinite amount of processes 

The only way that I could describe how I feel at the moment, with cracking through and breaking through into code, is that it feels like an addiction 

But an addiction in all of the best ways, in every way, shape and form because I can see the vision for where I can take my company without any limitations now 

But the good thing is I’ve just built out an easy step-by-step copy and paste SOP to replace what would be over £60,000 a month in staff wages 

And this is a new beginning for the coach consultant

How can you honestly not see how incredible things are now?

Anything is possible for anyone with AI - for anything

Information alone is slowly becoming less valuable

You are the new USP

Being you online isn’t just a recommendation

It’s what you need to do in order to stand out now

➡️➡️➡️ we have a x10 better natural qualification process to find YOUR people

You can just flow, talk and chat about things you are passionate about

Wait for the topics that land

Wait for the creative that clicks

People with 5,000 followers can and will build bigger businesses than those with 500,000 who have a stronger personal brand and better knowledge of AI

Comment “PROJECTS” to have your mind literally blown ☺️

If you’re a solo-preneur you’re bottlenecking yourself and you’re not doing enough.

If you have a team, you’re not giving them enough time, resources, and systems to follow.

You could put one hundred businesses in front of me and I would be able to point out where all of them are bottle-necking themselves because they ain’t got enough time to do something properly

If you’re only using ChatGPT and you think AI is shit, I dare you to read that guide because you need to open your eyes 

If you’re currently using Claude, this will legitimately blow your mind at how little you are actually using it

Last week I built out a complete SOP for this system, which included every instruction, every bit of knowledge, every SOP and explanation known to man 

We will have the first ever solo billionaire in 2026 with a project set up like this and AI agents integrated 

And the funny thing is this is just projects… code takes it to a different league all together.

Comment “PROJECTS”

Big Bobby doing the business - @coachedbybobby 

Extending the facility downstairs after performance of Open Gym membership 

Gym location two is also on the horizon, which I can see happening in the next six months 

Full website overhaul 

Monthly content and email marketing campaigns 

Now hiring administration and executive assistant team to free up founder time 

Bobby is not tech savvy in any way, shape or form and is the first person to admit that 

But he’s done the work and now he’s going to reap the reward 

You know where we’re at 🤝

If you have a vision for it, you can do anything now

But you have to actually want to do it in the first place

This is why I find this era so exciting

If you want it, you can do it

If you have the patience, you can do it

But yeah, I see many people stuck in their ways and complaining about not making progress

That all start with your own standards

The kind of stuff that you work on when no one’s looking

It’s the part that generates momentum for everything else

Stop cheating your own potential

The Walk Out | 15th August 2026 - Men, Women & Children

In collaboration with @toms.talks__ & @walktalkmensclub 

We also have 30+ confirmed support partners (and growing) who you’ll see on the walk & talk page over the coming months.

Originally the plan was mission 100, which would mean £10,000 invested back into the community but we want to blow that figure out of the water.

I’m not asking for a single penny from you, just your support and attendance on the day if you can make it - or share into relevant groups.

I’ll be funding everything needed for the 15th, alongside the plan to host a mens retreat in the Lake District in 2027 with all expenses covered.

This event isn’t just to talk about it, it’s to stand up and fight against it.

To show every man who is silently struggling that he is not alone.

To remind fathers, sons, brothers, partners, and friends that their lives matter.

To create a space where strength is redefined - not as silence, but as support.

On the 15th of August 2026, we walk together.

Men. Women. Children. Families. Communities. United as one.

We are walking for the men who feel they have to “be strong” in silence.

We are walking for the men who never made it home.

We are walking for the men who are still here but hurting behind closed doors.

Facebook event will be in my bio from now until the 15th, if you want the direct link just DM ‘Walk Out’ and if you want to join as a supporting partner for the day - just let me know.

If this this hits you hard, good because you are the person that needs to hear it

… this isn’t coming from a malicious place

I want the best for everyone in my community and on here, as that of that you need to get over your own shit

In the seconds, minutes, hours, weeks or even years you sit on what isn’t going well…

You are taking time and attention away from what could be going well if you just get over it and get on with it

As you climb higher those risks become greater and falls even harder, and you have to maintain this same mindset 

In my experience… this is the number one reason some business owners don’t get off the ground 

If has nothing to with strategy… it’s down to not doing enough because they are distracted by their own BS

Had a wobble yesterday, worst anxiety I’ve had in many years and I was the epitome of this video

It happens to everyone - you just need to acknowledge it and understand it…

You can’t win living in a place of reactivity, you will burn shit down faster than you can ever rebuild it 

This video won’t get mad views but wow it’s the most important variable of everything 

You might feel reactive because you don’t have direction… if that’s the case, you know where we are!

And we actually understand human behaviour so we don’t judge based on where you are at right now 

We work together to improve it 👊🏻

You won’t love this all of the time, stop thinking you should be 😂

There’s a big difference between fun, enjoyment, and passion 

If you’re passionate about something then you can push through the pain that it puts on you 

If you think that this is going to be fun and enjoyable every single day, you’re in for a reality check 

There are extensive, long periods of time where you will go through nothing other than self-doubt 

You will fear the repercussions of things that potentially might not work 

You will go through an identity crisis the higher that you go through these levels 

Which is why I’ll come back to the point at the start around passion 

A lot of you don’t even enjoy your offers 

A lot of you don’t even enjoy your niche 

A lot of you don’t even enjoy creating content 

A lot of you don’t even know why you are even doing this 

No wonder you’re fucking burnt out, falling out with it and constantly hot and cold 

Don’t get lost with all this high-tech AI stuff and nail the basics of what you need to scale a business 

FYI we can’t help you with both above

Is this my life now?

Start up business owners - it will be awful for you but it doesn’t last forever when you start building a team.

Scaling business owners - you can design your own life, do you actually see that? Fuck the money (and you will earn more when you have space to innovate) 

Normal 9-5 jobs - you might need to answer this question sooner to see what else it is from your life you want and need.

Mums - you are the elite beyond elite, but it doesn’t last forever and speak to who you need to speak to in order to make things better 

Dads - what’s that dream you once had? Why did you give up on it - your wife and kids need a man filled with passion, not regret.

Least favourite parent - fuck knows on this one but I’m sure you can give me some good advice 😂

“With power comes great responsibility” aka read all of these slides before you fully artificially and unintentionally shaft yourself

Supercharge what you CURRENTLY do and deliver on, stepping out of your scope of practice “because you can” could become very costly in many different areas

“You are operating in a deficit of your own claims vs conviction, no wonder you aren’t making progress”

Getting things done has never been so easy with AI now

But it will requires effort, patience and iterations

It frustrates me when I see someone say they will do something 

And, then they don’t follow through with it

You are cheating yourself and nobody else

When you start executing the small things at 100%

It becomes a snowball effect, it may start small but it picks up speed and size quickly 

But, if you half arse doing that first ball… it will never take shape

Today’s task ➡️ do everything on your to do list, add some extras on and do that as well, follow your training program and diet exactly, drink enough water and delivery on what you said you would do for other people

Watch how you bounce out of bed tomorrow

If something isn’t working, more volume won’t fix it

That’s the law of diminishing returns - at some point the strategy itself has to change

Insanity principle - “doing the same thing and expecting a different return”

Then you need to define what your version of “working” actually is…

If something is damaging your reputation, your profits and your fulfilment beyond that of monetary value - then IMO, that’s fucked

Then you may say… “but I don’t have time to look at different strategies”

Yes you do, you have AI now

We don’t marry methods or push circle businesses into square holes so if you are in this spot and you want to chat, my DMs are always open

If you believe you’re a flawless person, you may well be a narcissist 😂

Or, you may be 100% centralised to yourself - in which I have never met a human who is 

Fears, flaws and insecurities come in many shapes and sizes

Yes, you can address them and discover more of an understanding for yourself

But they will still be there and you need to be able to still take action regardless 

This often means being uncomfortable - especially in an age of digital marketing and personal branding

Here are a few of mine - they are still there, the only difference is I’ve worked past them enough times to care a lot less

Golden target month achieved, client volume up, lifetime value up

And, he makes it his mission to constantly keep up

Alongside adding feedback and input which I value massively

Absolutely buzzing with his progression in the last 6 months

And I’m sure he will continue to do the same in the next 6 onwards

Here’s a taste of the book…

“As I’m writing this, I’m a multi-7 figure business owner, husband, father, team leader. I am happy, I have freedom and purpose, and that hasn’t been an easy road. So despite how open I am about my previous struggles throughout the book, I want you to know that the journey I’m about to take you on—through both the crushing lows and exhilarating highs, has led me to a place where life finally makes sense. Where the chaos has order. Where the daily battles have purpose. Where I am winning, when for a very long time, I didn’t know how long I’d be able to maintain participation.

This isn’t just another business book (even though there are 154 key actionable’s).

This isn’t just another self-help manifesto (despite there being 96 life lesson’s).

This is the raw, unfiltered story of how I discovered what I call “The 50/50 Rule”, the fundamental truth that success, fulfilment, and genuine impact come from mastering two distinct but equally crucial domains: your inner world and your outer systems.

50% human. 50% machine.

One of the biggest problems I’m seeing with business owners is them collecting AI tools

It’s almost like a brag of “have you seen this” “have you seen that” “are you doing this” “are you doing that”

X is better than Y

I personally hate ChatGpt - I’ll only use it for a few quick GPT tools

But if you love it, then thats absolutely fine

You need to focus on one system and maximising it, as most people (and myself) are still using a single platform at 0.00001% of it’s capability

I’ve been obsessed with Claude for the last 12 months (before it was cool), and I won’t be going anywhere else

Chat
Projects
CoWork
Code 

But you can do the same on many other platforms, but just stop jumping between subscriptions and shiny object syndrome

Maximise one, sign up to the pro plan and absolutely rinse it

It will change your life and business, like it has done for me

A good pot washer has a system

That’s not a low skill job

Nothing should ever be beneath you

You do what needs doing, and you do it well

Pride isn’t about the title

It’s about the standard you hold yourself to
